glycerin.description: A natural humectant that pulls moisture into the skin. Excellent for dehydration.

polysorbate 20.description: An emulsifier that can feed Malassezia yeast.

isopropyl myristate.description: An ester often used as an emollient. Highly triggering for fungal acne.

hyaluronic acid.description: A powerful moisture-binding ingredient. Essential for dehydrated skin.

alcohol denat.description: Drying alcohol that can compromise the skin barrier and worsen dehydration.

ceramide np.description: A lipid that helps restore the skin barrier. Very safe and helpful.

niacinamide.description: Vitamin B3. Helps with skin barrier and oil control.

fragrance.description: A common irritant and allergen. High hazard score due to lack of transparency.
